name: qwik-packflow-fulfillment-board
description: Static Qwik fulfillment board with optimistic packing tickets, local recovery, Tailwind CSS 4, and retryable mock carrier sync.
engines-annotation: Mostly required by sharp which needs a Node-API v9 compatible runtime

scripts.build.server: qwik check-client src dist && vite build -c adapters/static/vite.config.ts
scripts.deploy: echo 'Static deploy: npm run build, publish dist'
scripts.preview: npm run build && npm run build.preview && vite preview --host 0.0.0.0
